# PERF-027 negative: large buffer pooled and reused across iterations
lang: go
file: PERF-027-safe.go
---
package sample

import "sync"

var bufPool = sync.Pool{
	New: func() interface{} {
		b := make([]byte, 8192)
		return &b
	},
}

func EncodeChunks(chunks []string) int {
	total := 0
	for range chunks {
		bp := bufPool.Get().(*[]byte)
		buf := *bp
		total += len(buf)
		bufPool.Put(bp)
	}
	return total
}
